changes.description: Baseline run with original Chinese-language verbose SKILL.md

Rewrote SKILL.md in English, made concise, added explicit kebab-case rename guidance preserving dots in filenames (regex [^a-z0-9.] instead of [^a-z0-9]), added JSON output guidance. Fixed fs-batch-rename from 70 to 100, but fs-search regressed to 85 due to missing-dot extension keys.
Added explicit note that file extensions in JSON must include leading dot (e.g., ".ts" not "ts"). Fixed extension format but nested_depth still wrong (3 instead of 4).
Added explicit guidance that find -printf %d is 0-based and needs +1 when root directory counts as depth 1. Both tasks now score 100.
